title: I quit my 80k corporate job to sell secondhand clothes in Gikomba and now make 3x more
raw_text: Everyone called me crazy for leaving a 'good job' at a bank to hawk mitumba. Six months in, I'm clearing 250k a month on a good month, I employ two people, and I actually understand my customers. The corporate ladder was a lie. AMA about starting a bale business from scratch.
